## Issues

Closes #52

## Summary

Builds a complete admin wine management interface and adds supporting backend endpoints for reference data so admins can perform wine CRUD from a browser UI.

## Changes

- Added new admin UI shell, styles, and client logic:
- public/admin-wines.html
- public/admin-wines.css
- public/admin-wines.js
- Added frontend route for the admin page at /admin/wines.
- Added protected admin reference endpoint /api/admin/wine-options (regions + wineries).
- Added admin reference controller/service and dependency wiring.
- Extended region and winery repository interfaces/implementations with findMany().
- Added/updated tests for routes, controller, service, and repository coverage, including non-Error catch-path coverage.
- Achieved full 100% coverage threshold compliance.

## Verification

- [x] npm run build
- [x] npm run test
- [x] npm run test:coverage
- [x] npx prisma validate
- [x] Relevant endpoint checks completed

## Checklist

- [x] No secrets were added
- [x] README and docs updated (if needed)
- [x] Backward compatibility considered
